raw_consumer_statement:
Credit card XXXX XXXX is not protecting me against false advertising fraud. 
They have a dispute process where they do not employee senior account dispute resolution specialists to speak to the customer whenever they call. Disputes are forwarded to XXXX, and they are defrauding the clients out of preventing fraud on their accounts. They offer a call back and do so at their discretion. Half the time they do not call me back, the other XXXX of the time they call me at XXXX. I am XXXX and in chronic pain, I cant leave my ringer on for them to wake me at any point because they have failed to provide proper and basic service to the customers. XXXX has said I failed to prove a refund of monies was issued by the fraudulent falsely adverstised hotel. I never provided the hotel with my credit card, but the booking agent paid them eventhough I notified them it was fraud. Either way my card is required to protect me against fraud and XXXX has failed me. I your business to reach out to XXXX and help me with the fact they are breaking the law in this deceitful practice.
